description:
Established in December 2022 in France, KAMITBRAINS IT is my self-employed structure (Entreprise Individuelle, SIRET 92203463200013) dedicated to the design, development, and hosting of advanced software solutions.

Current Status: My independent activity is temporarily on hold (inactive status) due to my current permanent employment contract (CDI).

items.title: Flexibility & Autonomy
items.text: Collaboration via service agreements, payroll umbrella companies (portage salarial), or freelance contracts tailored to your needs.

items.title: Legal Framework & Transparency
items.text: Registered structure in France, professional liability insurance, and streamlined invoicing.

items.title: Hosting & Maintenance
items.text: Secure hosting of your applications and long-term maintenance support.
